Off Calendar Oct-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory Ryken for NP Apartments (plaintiff and moving party). Joanne Blackburn for Associated Materials (defendant). Karl Thurmond (via courtcall) for Associated Materials.

Argued. Ms. Blackburn stated she does not agree with the argument that all the claims are intertwined and that it is difficult to define and provided case background. Mr. Ryken argued that he did use block billing and identified which party he communicated with using time slips.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Motion for attorney's fees is taken under submission. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: N. Wong, Bailiff: Deputy Leilu. Not Reported, D501.

MOTION TO TAX COSTS
Off Calendar Sep-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Karl S. Thurmond, Esq. of the Law Office of Karl S, Thrumond for Associated Materials, LLC., Defendant/Moving Party.
Gregory J. Ryken, Esq. of the Law Offices of Gregory J. Ryken appearing for NP Apartments, LLC, Plaintiff.

Matter called. The Court stated that it is here on Defendant Associated Materials, LLC's Motion to Tax Costs, that it had reviewed all documents and also reviewed the record from the trial proceedings.

The Court's tentative ruling is presented in open court.

The COURT STATED THAT IT IS INCLINED TO TAX THE FOLLOWING COSTS:
- $6,698.06 as to models, etc.;
- $600.00 in costs as to the large frame windows (the Court noted that $1500.00 is allowed and calculated at $100.00 per day for 15 days of trial);
- $1,640.00 in costs to operate the powerpoint projector (the Court noted that $2000.00 is allowed and calculated at $100.00 per hour for 20 hours);
- $17,705.50 in costs for the powerpoint presentation.

The Court stated that the remainder of the costs would be allowed.

Argument held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court took Associated Materials, LLC's Motion to Tax Costs under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Matter not reported.
